heading: Administration, operation, and maintenance
label: 3194 Administration, operation, and maintenance
text: The Secretary shall approve Federal assistance under this chapter only if the Secretary is satisfied that the project for which Federal assistance is granted will be properly and efficiently administered, operated, and maintained.
